hero.title: Workspace member controls
hero.body: Manage human access: create users with temporary passwords, change roles inline, and protect the final active admin from accidental lockout.

table.title: Workspace members
table.body: Members in this workspace. Roles update inline; suspension requires confirmation.

addMember.title: Create workspace member
addMember.body: Provision a user with a temporary password. The first login will redirect them into the password change flow automatically.
addMember.emailHint: Each user belongs to this workspace.
addMember.roleHint: Admins can manage billing, settings, members, and agent enrollment.

emptyState.title: No members yet
emptyState.body: This workspace only has the owner account. Add operators or viewers to distribute access.

actions.suspendBody: Suspend {{email}}. They will lose access until an admin reactivates the account.

status.lastAdminError: The last active admin cannot be demoted or suspended.

errors.weakPassword: Temporary password must be at least 12 characters and not obviously weak.
